name: Δ Hidden Forbidden Bulwark
author: ᵂᶤʳᵉᵈ
description: Morrigu Barrow‚ the great wall that surrounds the world and blocks all earthly access to the Heavenly Path․ With the Heavenly Path sealed‚ so to was the light of the gods․ Without its protection‚ the earth gradually grew wilder and darker‚ corrupted by a power known as the Shadow․ Faithfully recreated from the game ․hack⁄⁄G․U․ Last Recode
